news_items.headline: Francisco Lindor 'getting close' to returning to Mets lineup
news_items.summary: Mets star shortstop Francisco Lindor, currently rehabbing his left calf strain at Triple-A Syracuse, is nearing a return to the major league lineup. He could play a simulated game at Citi Field on Monday to maintain his workload.

news_items.headline: JJ Wetherholt Homers Help Cardinals Win Slugfest Over the Royals Sunday
news_items.summary: Dustin May was not in his finest form Sunday, but it didn’t matter as JJ Wetherholt, Iván Herrera and the St. Louis Cardinals offense absolutely unloaded on the Kansas City Royals Sunday afternoon eventually winning a slugfest. The St. Louis Cardinals bullpen would be worn out by the end of it, though. It only took […]
